Author: Drew Noakes
Description:
The C# Dev Kit team replaced C++ Node.js addons with C# and Native AOT, removing a dependency on Python. This post walks through building a Node.js native addon entirely in C# using N-API, LibraryImport, and UnmanagedCallersOnly.

The post [Writing Node.js addons with .NET Native AOT](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/dotnet/writing-nodejs-addons-with-dotnet-native-aot/) appeared first on [.NET Blog](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/dotnet).
Title: Writing Node.js addons with .NET Native AOT
